retry_reason: drm_gem_object_put always succeeds and is unconditionally called; retrying would be a double-put which is a use-after-free bug.
contract_summary: This function releases one reference to the DRM GEM object backing the amdxdna_gem_obj. It is a pure put wrapper: after calling, the caller must not use the abo pointer or any resources derived from it (the object may be freed). No return value to check; the operation always succeeds. This is the release counterpart to a previous get (e.g., drm_gem_object_get). The function is inline and incurs no overhead beyond the direct put call.
